entries.title: DEMONSTRATIONS 21:6 on jeremiah 51:64
entries.excerpt: And with regard to Babylon Jeremiah said, Babylon shall fall and shall not rise. And behold! To this day it continues in desolation and will do so forever.

entries.title: ON JEREMIAH 10:51 on jeremiah 51:64
entries.excerpt: The Lord ordered these things to happen to comfort the Judean captives so that, when they had learned about Babylon's capture and their own freedom, they might have as their consolation the hope of these good things.
